parameter_basis: Tihic thesis PC-SAFT-compatible sPC-SAFT rows and family correlations; perfluorohexane is derived from the fluorinated-family molecular-weight correlations and hexane uses the reported Approach I row.
binary_interaction_basis: Single-case source fit against the retained Matsuda/NIST paired perfluorohexane + hexane branch rows at 293.895 K and 101.3 kPa using the internal neutral PC-SAFT diagnostic.
scope_statement: This fixture retains one neutral, nonelectrolyte, nonreactive, nonassociating binary LLE internal sampled-candidate diagnostic. It does not establish global HELD phase-set completeness or admit public LLE, associating, electrolyte, reactive, CE, or CPE behavior.
